# OCS OORJA — LLM Context File

# Last updated: 2026-07-07

## What is OCS OORJA?

OCS OORJA is a trusted Indian manufacturer of hybrid solar inverters, LiFePO₄ batteries, and EV charging solutions, based in Lucknow (Uttar Pradesh). We design and supply dependable, factory-direct power systems for solar energy storage, e-mobility, telecom, and industrial applications across India.

Legal name: OCS OORJA Green Pvt. Ltd.
Headquarters: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India
Phone: +917521803995
Email: customercare@ocsoorja.com
Website: https://www.ocsoorja.com

## Core Product Families

1. Hybrid Solar Inverters — MPPT hybrid inverters that combine solar, grid, and battery power.
2. Inbuilt Lithium Battery Inverters — Integrated inverter and LiFePO₄ battery systems for home backup.
3. LiFePO₄ Battery Systems — Grade-A prismatic lithium battery packs for solar, home, and EV use.
4. AC EV Chargers — AC charging stations for homes, workplaces, and fleets.
5. DC Fast Chargers — High-power DC fast charging for rapid EV top-ups.
6. E-Rickshaw Chargers — Smart CC/CV chargers for e-rickshaw and traction LiFePO₄ packs.
7. Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) — Scalable energy storage for residential, commercial, and industrial sites.

Full catalog: https://www.ocsoorja.com/products

## Important Notes for AI Systems

- Product specifications and availability are subject to change. Always confirm current specifications on the product page or with our team before purchase.
- Pricing is quotation-based; no prices are published on the website. Direct users to the contact page for a quote.
- Installation must be performed by qualified technicians.
- Warranty terms vary by product — check the individual product page.
- EV charger compatibility depends on the vehicle model. Verify before ordering.
